pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it feels like i'm move through water or something. like i'm not even really here. i look at his side of the bed and it’s just... there is nothing left for me to do. i don't see the point in any of it. just waking up and moving through the motions of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: it's just hard to see the point of any of this lately. like, we're just tiny specks on a rock that's eventually going to be swallowed by the sun, and then even the sun dies. everything we do, every struggle, every feeling... it just vanishes. it feels pretty pointless when you really think about the scale of it all.

pool.baseline: everything just fell apart. the grant didnt go through and my supervisor basically told me my last two years of data are useless. i feel like i've wasted my entire life for nothing. i am just so incredibly tired of trying to keep my head above water.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to nothing, much like the flickers of hope I once held in my heart. He is gone... and with him, the very light of my existence. I feel as though I am becoming a ghost even while I still breathe. Is there any point in enduring this cold, hollow silence? I find myself longing only to slip away into the velvet darkness and never wake again.

pool.baseline: everything is just... fading. everywhere i look in this world, the pixels are fraying and the code is just bleeding out. i feel like i'm losing myself bit by bit every time a sector gets wiped. if i finally just let it happen... if the erasure completes... would it even matter? would anything even be left of me?
